channel.title: Uranium on Factorio Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Uranium on Factorio Guide

item.title: Factorio Kovarex Enrichment Guide - Nuclear Uranium Processing Loop
item.description:
Kovarex enrichment is the uranium processing upgrade that turns waste into fuel. Without it, uranium ore yields mostly U-238 —barely enough U-235 to keep a single reactor running.

TL;DR: Kovarex centrifuges convert 40 U-238 + 40 U-235 鈫?41 U-238 + 1 U-235. Net: -40 U-238, +1 U-235 per cycle. Build 3 centrifuges per reactor. Kickstart requires 40 U-235 accumulated first.

The Enrichment Loop

Kovarex centrifuges run a different recipe from standard uranium processing:
